trigger: 怀上沈睿后在娘家养胎，手做虎头帽

appearance_delta.face: 面容柔和但眼神依然坚定
appearance_delta.hair: 已婚妇人发髻，简洁舒适
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 手持针线做虎头帽，母性光辉与决绝并存

costume_override.outfit: 宽松舒适的孕妇襦裙，诰命夫人服饰简化版

visual_reference: pregnant Chinese woman in loose comfortable hanfu, married woman hairstyle, gentle face with determined eyes, holding embroidered tiger-head hat, sitting in courtyard with grapes nearby, soft maternal glow mixed with resolute character, ancient China noble house
emotional_tone: 温柔中带着坚定，母爱与决绝共存
